allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(data[:3], indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total quotes: {len\(data[\\"quotes\\"]\)}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); q=d['quotes'][0]; print\('trip_uid:', q['legs'][0]['trip_uid']\); print\('bookable:', q['bookable']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\('Stops:', len\(d.get\('route',[]\)\)\);")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d['quotes'][0]['legs'][0]['trip_uid'] if d.get\('quotes'\) else 'NO QUOTES'\)")
